tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glucose control, suggestive of prediabetes or early diabetes. Creatinine is slightly elevated, which may reflect reduced renal function and warrants monitoring, especially given age. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and follow-up for glycemic control and renal function.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud

name.value: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
